item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 5min 'I did something so stupid, so ridiculous, so embarrassing that they couldn't possibly br
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 5min 'I did something so stupid, so ridiculous, so embarrassing that they couldn't possibly broadcast it - Chris Tarrant must have thought I was a prize idiot'
Chris Cook talks to the Post's longest-serving writer John Randall
Read with RacingPost+ De racingpost.com 1 580

item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 34min Karl Burke on Hankelow, according to the Racing Post: "He's a horse who would be bette
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 34min Karl Burke on Hankelow, according to the Racing Post: "He's a horse who would be better with a little bit of cut in the ground but if it's safe, we'll let him take his chance." It is heavily-watered good ground at Newmarket - loose, irresponsible talk. Cita Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 6h THURSDAY stats and info. How the fields stood up at the overnight stage - and opening copy on the four ITV races. They'll be more to come later/in morning but initial thoughts on 25s, 16s and 10s chances here - and the Wood Ditton; https:// tips.akbets.co.uk/tony-calvin-th ursday-details-at-newmarket/ … 1 1 mil
